products.name: Collier Éternel
products.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect fill='%23f3e9d8' width='200' height='200'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='60' r='20' fill='%23d4af37'/%3E%3Cpath d='M80 80 Q100 100 120 80' stroke='%23d4af37' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/%3E%3Crect x='85' y='100' width='30' height='40' fill='%234b90e2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
products.description: Un collier élégant en or blanc avec pierre précieuse sertie, idéal pour les occasions spéciales.

products.name: Bague Lumière
products.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect fill='%23f3e9d8' width='200' height='200'/%3E%3Crect x='60' y='80' width='80' height='50' rx='15' fill='%23d4af37'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='85' r='15' fill='%234b90e2'/%3E%3Crect x='85' y='105' width='30' height='25' fill='%23f0ad4e'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
products.description: Bague en or rose sertie d'un saphir bleuté, conçue pour une commande sur-mesure.

products.name: Bracelet Charme
products.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect fill='%23f3e9d8' width='200' height='200'/%3E%3Cpath d='M40 100 Q50 80 100 75 Q150 80 160 100' stroke='%23d4af37' stroke-width='8' fill='none'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='60' cy='95' r='6' fill='%23f0ad4e'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='100' cy='78' r='6' fill='%23f0ad4e'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='140' cy='95' r='6' fill='%23f0ad4e'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
products.description: Bracelet en perles et or jaune, conçu pour les clients premium qui veulent se démarquer.

products.name: Boucles d'oreilles Diamant
products.image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 200'%3E%3Crect fill='%23f3e9d8' width='200' height='200'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='70' cy='60' r='12' fill='%23d4af37'/%3E%3Cpath d='M70 72 Q65 85 70 100' stroke='%23d4af37' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/%3E%3Crect x='65' y='105' width='10' height='35' fill='%234b90e2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='130' cy='60' r='12' fill='%23d4af37'/%3E%3Cpath d='M130 72 Q125 85 130 100' stroke='%23d4af37' stroke-width='2' fill='none'/%3E%3Crect x='125' y='105' width='10' height='35' fill='%234b90e2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E

products.name: Collier Saphir Royal

products.name: Bague Fiançailles Or

products.name: Montre Luxe Bijou
